content: TASK-070 checkpoint done: Prototype map edges now use branch-aware color assignment. Single-outgoing transitions keep the default blue, while sources with multiple outgoing transitions get distinct colors; semantic flows/triggers still take precedence for error/success/back/redirect/submit. Arrow markers are generated per color so arrowheads match their line, and edge labels use the same color for easier branch matching. This is intentionally separate from zone coloring: zone remains ownership/area color, while Prototype edge color is a local readability aid for screenflow branching. Verification: npm run typecheck, npm test -- --run test/prototype.test.ts, and npm run build passed. TASK-056 performance remains open.
